## Appointments & Affiliations

::: {.appointments}

::: {.appointment-item}
<span class="appointment-dates">2024–present</span>

### Assistant Professor

**Department of Human Development and Family Studies**  
Penn State University

**Affiliations**  
Social Science Research Institute (SSRI)  
Geroscience Consortium, Center for Healthy Aging
:::

::: {.appointment-item}
<span class="appointment-dates">2020–2023</span>

### Assistant Professor

**Psychology Department**  
Human Factors and Cognitive Psychology Program  
University of Central Florida
:::

:::

<style>
.appointments {
  display: grid;
  gap: 1.25rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.appointment-item {
  border-left: 4px solid #4f46e5;
  background: #f8fafc;
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
}

.appointment-dates {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
  color: #475569;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.appointment-item h3 {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  color: #111827;
}

.appointment-item p {
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
}
</style>
